title: BigBear.ai, Inc. Common Stock (BBAI) Earnings Report Dates & Earnings Forecasts
text: BigBear.ai, Inc. (BBAI) earnings report dates and forecasts on Nasdaq. The company releases earnings quarterly with forecasts provided by analyst consensus. Q3 2024 earnings were expected on November 5, 2024 with consensus estimates for $46.03M revenue and -$0.07 EPS. Current forecasts for 2026 show revenue guidance of $135-165M with continued earnings losses as the company scales its national security AI business.
